code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      match string.parse_int(p)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut new_sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  mut inserted = false
  while j < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(y)
      if not inserted and x < y
        new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, y)
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    new_sorted = list.push(new_sorted, x)
  end
  new_sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_ints(line1)
let b = parse_ints(line2)

mut inter: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < a.len()
  match a.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(inter, x)
      inter = list.push(inter, x)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut k = 0
while k < inter.len()
  match inter.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, x)
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut m = 0
  while m < sorted.len()
    match sorted.get(m)
    when Some(x)
      if m == 0
        out = "#{x}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    m = m + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
